name: Simple New Tab
description: A minimalistic, configurable new tab page.
author: cubedhuang
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src https://api.openweathermap.org https://api.lanyard.rest; img-src 'self' data: https:
